# -*- CMakeLists.txt generated by CodeLite IDE. Do not edit by hand -*-

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.15)


#{{{{ User Code 01
# Place your code here
#}}}}

# Project name and version — edit VERSION file to cut a new release
file(READ "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/VERSION" MXTUNE_VERSION)
string(STRIP "${MXTUNE_VERSION}" MXTUNE_VERSION)
project(mx_tune VERSION ${MXTUNE_VERSION})
enable_language(CXX C ASM)
add_definitions(-DMXTUNE_VERSION="${MXTUNE_VERSION}")

# Derive a per-version VST3 plugin code so each version is treated as a
# distinct plugin by hosts (allows multiple versions loaded simultaneously).
# Scheme: 0x4d58MMPP  where MM = major<<4|minor, PP = patch  ('MX' prefix)
string(REPLACE "." ";" _ver_parts "${MXTUNE_VERSION}")
list(GET _ver_parts 0 _ver_major)
list(GET _ver_parts 1 _ver_minor)
list(GET _ver_parts 2 _ver_patch)
math(EXPR MXTUNE_PLUGIN_CODE
    "(0x4d58 * 65536) + (${_ver_major} * 4096) + (${_ver_minor} * 256) + ${_ver_patch}")
# Override JucePlugin_Name and JucePlugin_PluginCode (both are #ifndef-guarded
# in JucePluginDefines.h, so command-line -D definitions take precedence).
add_definitions("-DJucePlugin_Name=\"MXTune ${MXTUNE_VERSION}\"")
add_definitions(-DJucePlugin_PluginCode=${MXTUNE_PLUGIN_CODE})
# Pin AU subtype to a fixed printable 4-char code ('MXTn' = 0x4d58546e) so the
# AU component identity stays stable across version bumps.
add_definitions(-DJucePlugin_AUSubType=0x4d58546e)
# Explicitly enable VST3 — JucePluginDefines.h may default to 0 when the
# project is regenerated by the VS2019-only exporter on non-Windows platforms.
add_definitions(-DJucePlugin_Build_VST3=1)



#{{{{ User Code 02
# Place your code here
#}}}}

# This setting is useful for providing JSON file used by CodeLite for code completion
set(CMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS 1)

set(CONFIGURATION_NAME "cmake")

set(CL_WORKSPACE_DIRECTORY .)
# Set default locations
set(CL_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/${CL_WORKSPACE_DIRECTORY}/cmake-build-${CONFIGURATION_NAME}/output)
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CL_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CL_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CL_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})

# Projects


# Top project
# Define some variables
set(PROJECT_mx_tune_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}")
set(WORKSPACE_PATH "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/")



#{{{{ User Code 1
# Place your code here

set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "")
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "")
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY "")

IF (UNIX)
    find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
    pkg_check_modules(AUBIO REQUIRED IMPORTED_TARGET aubio)
    pkg_check_modules(SOUNDTOUCH REQUIRED soundtouch)
    pkg_check_modules(RUBBERBAND REQUIRED rubberband)
    pkg_check_modules(FFTW3F REQUIRED fftw3f)
IF (NOT APPLE)
    pkg_check_modules(SAMPLERATE REQUIRED samplerate)
    pkg_check_modules(X11 REQUIRED x11)
    pkg_check_modules(FREETYPE REQUIRED freetype2)
ENDIF ()

    set(MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES, "")
    set(MX_TUNE_CFLAGS, "")

    foreach(list ${AUBIO_LIBRARIES} ${SOUNDTOUCH_LIBRARIES} ${RUBBERBAND_LIBRARIES} ${SAMPLERATE_LIBRARIES} ${X11_LIBRARIES} ${FFTW3F_LIBRARIES})
        set(MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES ${MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES} " -l${list}" )
    endforeach(list)

    foreach(list ${AUBIO_CFLAGS} ${SOUNDTOUCH_CFLAGS} ${RUBBERBAND_CFLAGS} ${SAMPLERATE_CFLAGS} ${FFTW3F_CFLAGS} ${X11_CFLAGS} ${FREETYPE_CFLAGS})
        set(MX_TUNE_CFLAGS ${MX_TUNE_CFLAGS} " ${list}" )
    endforeach(list)

    string(REPLACE ";" " " MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES ${MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES})
    string(REPLACE ";" " " MX_TUNE_CFLAGS ${MX_TUNE_CFLAGS})

    include_directories(
        ${AUBIO_INCLUDE_DIRS}
        ${SOUNDTOUCH_INCLUDE_DIRS}
        ${RUBBERBAND_INCLUDE_DIRS}
        ${FFTW3F_INCLUDE_DIRS}
        ${SAMPLERATE_INCLUDE_DIRS}
        ${X11_INCLUDE_DIRS}
        ${FREETYPE_INCLUDE_DIRS}
    )

ENDIF ()
#}}}}

include_directories(
    src
    JUCE/Source
)

# Use SYSTEM includes for third-party headers so their warnings are suppressed
# when they are transitively included by project source files
include_directories(SYSTEM
    JUCE/JuceLibraryCode
    JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/modules
    VST3_SDK
)


# Compiler options
add_definitions(-Os)
add_definitions(-O2)
add_definitions(-fpermissive)
add_definitions(-fPIC)
add_definitions(-Wreturn-type)
add_definitions(-Wsign-compare)
add_definitions(-Wuninitialized)
add_definitions(-Wno-unused-parameter)
add_definitions(
    -DJUCE_MODAL_LOOPS_PERMITTED=1
)


# Linker options
set(LINK_OPTIONS ${LINK_OPTIONS} -fPIC)


if(WIN32)
    # Resource options
endif(WIN32)

# Library path
link_directories(
    .
)

# Define the C sources
set ( C_SRCS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/Source/kvbuf.c
)

# Define the CXX sources
set ( CXX_SRCS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/Source/PluginGui.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/Source/SettingGui.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/mx_tune.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/manual_tune.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/pitch_shifter_rb.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/ring_buffer.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/pitch_shifter_st.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/pitch_detector_aubio.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/Source/KeyDetectGui.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/smbPitchShift.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/pitch_shifter_smb.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/pitch_detector_talent.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/undo_redo.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/Source/PluginProcessor.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/auto_tune.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/midi_msg.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/delay.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/src/pitch_shifter_talent.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/Source/PluginParameter.cpp
)

# JUCE plugin client wrappers — glob so only files Projucer actually
# generates for the configured plugin formats (VST3 only) are included.
# VST2/Standalone/Unity are not in pluginFormats and won't be generated.
if(APPLE)
    file(GLOB JUCE_PLUGIN_CLIENT_SRCS
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_plugin_client_*.cpp"
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_plugin_client_*.mm"
    )
else()
    file(GLOB JUCE_PLUGIN_CLIENT_SRCS
        "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_plugin_client_*.cpp"
    )
endif()

set_source_files_properties(
    ${CXX_SRCS} PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS
    " -Os -O2 -std=c++17 -fpermissive -fPIC -Wextra -Woverloaded-virtual -Wreorder -Wreturn-type -Wsign-compare -Woverflow -Wunused-function -Wunused-label -Wunused-variable -Wuninitialized -Wno-non-virtual-dtor -Wno-unused-parameter")

set_source_files_properties(
    ${C_SRCS} PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS
    " -Os -O2 -fpermissive -fPIC -Wno-unused-parameter -Wreturn-type -Wsign-compare -Woverflow -Wunused-function -Wunused-label -Wunused-variable -Wuninitialized")

if(WIN32)
    enable_language(RC)
    set(CMAKE_RC_COMPILE_OBJECT
        "<CMAKE_RC_COMPILER> ${RC_OPTIONS} -O coff -i <SOURCE> -o <OBJECT>")
endif(WIN32)



#{{{{ User Code 2
# Place your code here

OPTION(MXTUNE_USE_STATIC_LIB "use static library" OFF)

IF (APPLE)
# Enable AU v2 — JucePluginDefines.h defaults to 0 because the .jucer only has
# a VS2019 exporter; override here so the AU client source files compile active code.
add_definitions(-DJucePlugin_Build_AU=1)
# AudioUnitSDK headers ship inside the JUCE module; expose them to the compiler.
include_directories(SYSTEM
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/modules/juce_audio_plugin_client/AU"
)
set (JUCE_LIB_SRCS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_events.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_basics.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_data_structures.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_gui_basics.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_processors.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_gui_extra.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_core.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_graphics.mm
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_plugin_client_VST_utils.mm
)
ELSE ()
set (JUCE_LIB_SRCS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_events.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_basics.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_data_structures.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_gui_basics.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_audio_processors.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_gui_extra.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_core.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_LIST_DIR}/JUCE/JuceLibraryCode/include_juce_graphics.cpp
)
ENDIF ()

# Suppress all warnings for JUCE third-party library files
set_source_files_properties(${JUCE_LIB_SRCS} ${JUCE_PLUGIN_CLIENT_SRCS} PROPERTIES COMPILE_FLAGS "-w")

set (CXX_SRCS ${CXX_SRCS} ${JUCE_LIB_SRCS} ${JUCE_PLUGIN_CLIENT_SRCS})

IF (WIN32)
    set(LINK_OPTIONS ${LINK_OPTIONS} "-static -lrubberband -lSoundTouch -laubio -lfftw3f -lfftw3 -lsamplerate")
ELSEIF (APPLE)
    execute_process(
        COMMAND brew --prefix
        OUTPUT_VARIABLE HOMEBREW_PREFIX
        OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE
    )
    include_directories("${HOMEBREW_PREFIX}/include")
    # Each option must be a separate list element so CMake passes them as
    # individual arguments to the linker driver instead of one quoted string.
    list(APPEND LINK_OPTIONS
        "-framework CoreFoundation"
        "-framework CoreServices"
        "-framework CoreGraphics"
        "-framework ImageIO"
        "-framework MapKit"
        "-framework CoreText"
        "-framework AudioToolbox"
        "-framework CoreAudio"
        "-framework CoreMIDI"
        "-framework AudioUnit"
        "-framework CoreVideo"
        "-framework IOKit"
        "-framework AppKit"
        "-framework Accelerate"
        "-framework QuartzCore"
        "-framework Metal"
        "-L${HOMEBREW_PREFIX}/lib"
        "-lrubberband"
        "-lSoundTouch"
        "-laubio"
        "-lfftw3f"
        "-lSystem"
    )
    # -iquote adds the project root to the quoted-include search path only,
    # preventing <version> (C++20 STL header) from resolving to ./VERSION
    # on macOS's case-insensitive filesystem.
    set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "-fvisibility=hidden -DNDEBUG -Wno-unknown-warning-option ${MX_TUNE_CFLAGS}")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "-fvisibility=hidden -std=c++17 -DNDEBUG -Wno-unknown-warning-option ${MX_TUNE_CFLAGS}")
ELSEIF (UNIX)
    set(CMAKE_C_FLAGS "-fvisibility=hidden ${MX_TUNE_CFLAGS}")
    set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "-fvisibility=hidden ${MX_TUNE_CFLAGS}")

    IF (MXTUNE_USE_STATIC_LIB)
        set(LINK_OPTIONS ${LINK_OPTIONS} "-s -lGL -lpthread -ldl -lX11 -lXext ${FREETYPE_LDFLAGS} -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,-Bsymbolic -Wl,-Bstatic ${MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES} -Wl,-Bdynamic -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--strip-all -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -fPIC")
    ELSE ()
        set(LINK_OPTIONS ${LINK_OPTIONS} "-s -lGL -lpthread -ldl -lX11 -lXext ${FREETYPE_LDFLAGS} -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,-Bsymbolic ${MX_TUNE_LIBRARIES} -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--strip-all -Wl,--exclude-libs,ALL -fPIC")
    ENDIF ()
ENDIF ()
#}}}}

add_library(mx_tune SHARED ${RC_SRCS} ${CXX_SRCS} ${C_SRCS} ${ASM_SRCS})
target_link_libraries(mx_tune ${LINK_OPTIONS})



#{{{{ User Code 3
# Place your code here
IF (WIN32)
    target_link_libraries(mx_tune
        gdi32
        user32
        kernel32
        comctl32
        winmm
        uuid
        wsock32
        wininet
        version
        ole32
        ws2_32
        oleaut32
        imm32
        comdlg32
        shlwapi
        rpcrt4
        opengl32
        dxgi
        d3d11
        gdiplus
        dwmapi
        aubio
        fftw3f
        SoundTouch
    )

ELSEIF (APPLE)
ELSEIF (UNIX)
    set_target_properties(mx_tune PROPERTIES
        NO_SONAME TRUE
        SKIP_BUILD_RPATH TRUE
    )
ENDIF ()
#}}}}
